-- 3 of 47 --

REMEMBER...
This isn’t about perfection.You will NEVER EVER EVER EVER create a
perfect product, a perfect squeeze page, a perfect offer, a perfect
launch. It is NOT going to happen.
The “pursuit of perfect” is simply a device that people use to avoid
stepping out of their comfort zone into a bigger life.
A product that is 80% right that gets released is 1,000x more impactful
for you and your clients than a nearly-perfect product that never gets
released!
www.getwsodownload.com

Remember...
• This Seed Launch process works... and I’ve modeled it for you, so I
suggest you strongly consider doing what I’ve done
• However, there are many ways to skin a cat...
• IMPORTANT: my process wasn’t perfect... and your’s doesn’t need to
be perfect either
• If you’re experienced, feel free to change the process
• If you’re a beginner... this process is time-tested. Stick to it.

What To Send To Your List
• Emails
• Videos
• Blog posts
• Offers (for your stuff and/or affiliate stuff)
• When you’re ready... your launches
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 21 of 47 --

What kind of content do you send?
• What are the three biggest objections they have?
• What are the three biggest opportunities they have?
• What are the three biggest questions they have?
• What are the three biggest dangers they have?
• What are the three biggest strengths that they have?
• What are the three biggest aspirations that they have?
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 22 of 47 --

1. Answer those questions and
you have 18 topics
2. Write (or create a video) about each topic...
send two of them a week.
3. When you’ve gone through all of them, go
back and start with the first one again.
4. Lather. Rinse. Repeat.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 23 of 47 --

Most Important List Wisdom:
START BUILDING NOW
and
NEVER STOP DOING IT

Module Five Homework
• REMEMBER! This is about progress, not perfection!
• Homework:
• Celebrate! You made it through Module 5!!
• Go into the community and leave a comment saying something
like “I made it through Module 5!!”
• Leave a comment for all the other people that made it through
Module 5... like “You rock” or “You’re on fire” or “Rock and
roll!” or “You’re crushing it” or “Congratulations” 	:-)
• And let’s keep this a secret for all us the Module 5 folks. :-)
• Finally, after you do your launch... email
support@productlaunchformula.com 	and tell me about it!

-- 45 of 47 --

“Our deepest fear is not that we are inadequate. Our deepest fear is
that we are powerful beyond measure. It is our light, not our
darkness that most frightens us. We ask ourselves, 'Who am I to be
brilliant, gorgeous, talented, fabulous?' Actually, who are you not to
be? You are a child of God. Your playing small does not serve the
world. There is nothing enlightened about shrinking so that other
people won't feel insecure around you. We are all meant to shine,
as children do. We were born to make manifest the glory of God that
is within us. It's not just in some of us; it's in everyone. And as we let
our own light shine, we unconsciously give other people permission
to do the same. As we are liberated from our own fear, our presence
automatically liberates others.”
- Marianne Williamson
www.getwsodownload.com
